title: quercus bidoupensis
intro: Quercus bidoupensis, also known as Bidoup oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to Vietnam. The bark and leaves of Quercus bidoupensis have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Quercus bidoupensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Quercus bidoupensis are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
